title: stelis covilleana
intro: Stelis covilleana, a species of orchid, is a rare and unique plant found in the wild, characterized by its small size and delicate appearance. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, leading to several health benefits including reduced inflammation and improved immune function. The herbal preparations of Stelis covilleana are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water, and it is also used in traditional remedies in the form of a decoction or tincture.
